html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Carrat

A Packet of Seeds is obtained by offering 2 Lucky Gold Nuggets to a Carrat Shrine. The Packet can be opened to drop 2 Seeds and 1 of .

Premium Seed Packet

A Premium Seed Packet is obtained by offering 4 Lucky Gold Nuggets to a Carrat Shrine. The Packet can be opened to drop 2 of and 1 of .
plainText:
Packet of Seeds
"A humble pack of assorted seeds."
Object Info
Perk
Contains various seeds.
Does not stack
Crafting
×2
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"yotc_seedpacket"
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Carrat
“Looks pretty seedy, if you ask me.”
–Wilson
“Just a bunch of seeds.”
–Willow
“Is seeds for growing.”
–Wolfgang
“Nothing grows in the garden of my heart.”
–Wendy
“JUMBLED PLANT SOURCE CODE”
–WX-78
“I used to be quite an avid gardener.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's a bit of a mixed bag. Of seeds.”
–Woodie
“I will reap what I sow.”
–Maxwell
“I care nöt för gröwing vegetables.”
–Wigfrid
“Hm, where should we plant them?”
–Webber
“I wonder what will grow from this?”
–Warly
“Shh... friends sleeping inside”
–Wormwood
“Some seeds.”
–Winona
“A packet of seeds, to do with as I please.”
–Wortox
“Tiny snacks!”
–Wurt
“Mystery seeds!”
–Walter
“I guess I should plant them at some point.”
–Wanda
A Packet of Seeds is obtained by offering 2 Lucky Gold Nuggets to a Carrat Shrine. The Packet can be opened to drop 2 Seeds and 1 of .

Premium Seed Packet
"A pack of high quality seeds."
Object Info
Perk
Contains various seeds.
Does not stack
Crafting
×4
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"yotc_seedpacket_rare"
“Hey there, fancy-plants!”
–Wilson
“Oh wow, special seeds, how exciting.”
–Willow
“Is fancy seeds for growing.”
–Wolfgang
“Everything that grows just dies eventually.”
–Wendy
“SUPPOSEDLY SUPERIOR PLANT SOURCE CODE”
–WX-78
“I wonder what species it will turn out to be.”
–Wickerbottom
“Whatcha think it'll grow into, Lucy?”
–Woodie
“This should yield a higher quality crop.”
–Maxwell
“The rarity öf these nön-meats döth nöt impress me.”
–Wigfrid
“We wonder what's gonna grow!”
–Webber
“I hope it grows into some tasty ingredients.”
–Warly
“Shh... friends sleeping inside”
–Wormwood
“Wonder what's gonna sprout outta these?”
–Winona
“Perhaps it contains magic beans? Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Wonder if it grow into something tasty.”
–Wurt
“Not knowing what they are is half the fun!”
–Walter
“They're of a higher quality than the usual seeds.”
–Wanda
A Premium Seed Packet is obtained by offering 4 Lucky Gold Nuggets to a Carrat Shrine. The Packet can be opened to drop 2 of and

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Một Gói Hạt Giống có thể nhận được bằng cách dâng 2 Thỏi Vàng May Mắn cho Đền Thờ Cà Ruột. Gói có thể được mở để thả 2 Hạt giống và 1 trong số .
title: Seed Packet
wikitext:
{{Object Infobox
|name = Packet of Seeds
|icon = Packet of Seeds.png
|description = A humble pack of assorted seeds.
|ingredient1 = Lucky Gold Nugget
|multiplier1 = 2
|filter = {{Pic32|Offerings Filter}}
|tier = 24
|stack = Does not stack
|perk = Contains various seeds.
|spawnCode="yotc_seedpacket"}}
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
{{Event|Year of the Carrat}}
{{Quotes
|wilson = Looks pretty seedy, if you ask me.
|willow = Just a bunch of seeds.
|wolfgang = Is seeds for growing.
|wendy = Nothing grows in the garden of my heart.
|wx78 = JUMBLED PLANT SOURCE CODE
|wickerbottom = I used to be quite an avid gardener.

|maxwell = I will reap what I sow.
|wigfrid = I care nöt för gröwing vegetables.
|webber = Hm, where should we plant them?
|winona = Some seeds.
|warly = I wonder what will grow from this?

|wormwood = Shh... friends sleeping inside

A '''Packet of Seeds''' is obtained by offering 2 [[Lucky Gold Nugget]]s to a [[Carrat Shrine]]. The Packet can be opened to drop 2 [[Seeds]] and 1 of {{pic32|Oblong Seeds}}{{pic32|Clustered Seeds}}{{pic32|Spiky Seeds}}{{pic32|Sharp Seeds}}{{pic32|Swirly Seeds}}{{pic32|Fluffy Seeds}}{{pic32|Square Seeds}}.

{{clr}}

A '''Premium Seed Packet''' is obtained by offering 4 Lucky Gold Nuggets to a Carrat Shrine. The Packet can be opened to drop 2 of {{pic32|Oblong Seeds}}{{pic32|Clustered Seeds}}{{pic32|Spiky Seeds}}{{pic32|Sharp Seeds}}{{pic32|Swirly Seeds}}{{pic32|Fluffy Seeds}}{{pic32|Square Seeds}} and 
1 of {{pic32|Tubular Seeds}}{{pic32|Windblown Seeds}}{{pic32|Brittle Seed Pods}}{{pic32|Bulbous Seeds}}.
